content: # **2026-05-06 WEEKLY REPORT** ## Blog Posts * **Status**: * **2026-04-30** - [Status Network to merge into Linea](https://status.app/blog/status-network-merges-with-linea-scaling-gasless-privacy-upstream) _Status Network pioneered native gasless execution as a breakthrough th..._ * **Logos**: * **2026-05-04** - [State of the Logos Network: April 2026](https://press.logos.co/article/april-2026) _Logos Testnet v0\.1\.2 now live, Testnet v0\.1 stats show stability, λ..._ ## Forum Posts * **Logos**: * **2026-05-04** - General - [Logos Circle - Warri, April](https://forum.logos.co/t/logos-circle-warri-april/1624/1) * **2026-05-04** - General - [Logos Circle - Awka, May](https://forum.logos.co/t/logos-circle-awka-may/1625/1) * **2026-05-03** - Tech - [Launched a Testnet explorer for Logos (indexer in progress)](https://forum.logos.co/t/launched-a-testnet-explorer-for-logos-indexer-in-progress/1621/1) * **2026-05-05** - Circles - [Logos Circle Enugu #3](https://forum.logos.co/t/logos-circle-enugu-3/1627/1) * **Vac**: * **2026-05-04** - Logos - [Service Discovery Network Simulation](https://forum.vac.dev/t/service-discovery-network-simulation/689/1)
